title: Wire new chapters into prev/next navigation tables
description: After merging brocw PR #2 that added navigation tables to all existing chapters, the two new chapters from the novice-gap audit (00-foundations/06-the-guild.md and 02-the-methodology/03-branches-and-pull-requests.md) need tables of their own, and four adjacent chapters need their Next/Previous pointers updated to thread the new chapters into reading order.
